name: Stuffed Green Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Frozen Corn, thawed and chopped
15 oz can Kidney Beans, rinsed and drained
2 cups Cheddar Cheese, shredded (reserve ¼ cup for serving)
4 small Green Peppers, stems removed and seeds taken out
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the frozen corn, kidney beans, tomatoes, onion, cooked rice, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper.
2. Remove ¼ cup of the shredded cheese for serving and set aside.
3. Stuff each green pepper with the corn-bean-rice mixture, leaving about ½ inch at the top of the peppers.
4. Place three peppers in the bottom of a crockpot (crock pot insert), and place the remaining pepper on top.
5. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours or high for 3 to 4 hours.
6. During the last 30 minutes of cooking, sprinkle the reserved shredded cheese over the peppers.
